exam_price_notes: Test fee approximately $50 plus ASE registration fee (~$36). Advanced specialist test.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Prometric test centers and ASE-authorized locations.

id_requirements: One government-issued photo ID with full name. Name must match ASE registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. ASE exams report Pass/Fail only — no numeric score is provided to the test-taker. Recertification required every 5 years by retaking the test.
renewal_options: ASE certifications are valid for 5 years. Recertification is achieved by retaking and passing the current version of the test before the expiration date. No continuing education requirement — recertification is exam-only.

prerequisites.description: Current ASE A8 Engine Performance certification required
2 years of hands-on automotive technician experience

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period between attempts. Full test fee required for retake. ASE registration fee applies per testing window.

official_study_resources.title: ASE Study Guides
official_study_resources.notes: Official ASE study guides available for purchase on the ASE website

official_study_resources.title: ASE Practice Tests
official_study_resources.notes: Official practice tests available for purchase via the ASE website
